query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(630003, 'Who wrote the Gospel of Luke?', 'multiple_choice', '["Luke the physician", "The apostle John", "Matthew", "Mark"]', 'Luke the physician', 1),
(630003, 'To whom was Luke''s Gospel addressed?', 'multiple_choice', '["Theophilus", "Timothy", "Titus", "The church at Rome"]', 'Theophilus', 2),
(630003, 'According to Luke 19:10, why did the Son of Man come?', 'multiple_choice', '["To seek and save the lost", "To judge the world", "To establish His kingdom", "To fulfill the Law"]', 'To seek and save the lost', 3),
(630003, 'How many miraculous signs does John organize his Gospel around?', 'multiple_choice', '["Seven", "Twelve", "Three", "Ten"]', 'Seven', 4),
(630003, 'Which Gospel contains the seven "I AM" statements of Jesus?', 'multiple_choice', '["John", "Luke", "Matthew", "Mark"]', 'John', 5),
(630003, 'Which parable is unique to Luke''s Gospel?', 'multiple_choice', '["The Good Samaritan", "The Sower", "The Mustard Seed", "The Wheat and Tares"]', 'The Good Samaritan', 6),
(630003, 'What does John 1:1-14 emphasize about Jesus?', 'multiple_choice', '["The Word became flesh", "Jesus'' genealogy", "Jesus'' baptism", "Jesus'' temptation"]', 'The Word became flesh', 7),
(630003, 'Which Gospel emphasizes Jesus'' compassion for outcasts including Gentiles, women, and sinners?', 'multiple_choice', '["Luke", "Matthew", "Mark", "John"]', 'Luke', 8),
(630003, 'What miracle is recorded only in John''s Gospel?', 'multiple_choice', '["The raising of Lazarus", "The feeding of the 5000", "Walking on water", "Healing the blind man"]', 'The raising of Lazarus', 9),
(630003, 'According to John 20:30-31, what is John''s stated purpose for writing?', 'multiple_choice', '["That readers might believe Jesus is the Christ and have life", "To provide a historical record", "To correct false teaching", "To establish church doctrine"]', 'That readers might believe Jesus is the Christ and have life', 10),
(630003, 'Explain how Luke and John complement each other in presenting Jesus Christ to their readers.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Luke emphasizes Jesus'' humanity and compassion as the universal Savior, while John reveals His divine nature and eternal relationship with the Father.', 11);

(630003, 'What does John 1:1-14 emphasize about Jesus?', 'multiple_choice', '["The Word became flesh", "Jesus'' genealogy", "Jesus'' baptism", "Jesus'' temptation"]', 'The Word became flesh', 7),
(630003, 'Which Gospel emphasizes Jesus'' compassion for outcasts including Gentiles, women, and sinners?', 'multiple_choice', '["Luke", "Matthew", "Mark", "John"]', 'Luke', 8),

(630003, 'Explain how Luke and John complement each other in presenting Jesus Christ to their readers.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Luke emphasizes Jesus'' humanity and compassion as the universal Savior, while John reveals His divine nature and eternal relationship with the Father.', 11);
